title: Metathelypteris dayi

intro: Metathelypteris dayi, also known as Day's lady fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Metathelypteris dayi include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Metathelypteris dayi is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
